title: Pack Catalog and Eligibility
description: Platform-wide pack catalog for managing pack definitions, eligibility rules, and pack-to-capability mapping. Platform operators manage the pack catalog and set eligibility rules. Deferred until pack infrastructure is built. Pack sensitivity is multi-dimensional. Distinct from tenant-admin.content.catalog which manages pack enablement within a single tenant.

dataSources.description: Pack definitions, eligibility rules, and capability mapping.
